title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25 billion. Here’s where the money is going.
summary: Tesla is increasing 2026 capex spending to $25 billion, three times its historical levels, which will result in negative free cash flow for the remainder of the year. The unprecedented investment signals a major strategic shift in the company's capital allocation.
content: Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.

zh.title: 特斯拉刚刚将支出计划增加到250亿美元。钱将流向何处。
zh.summary: 特斯拉将2026年资本支出增加到250亿美元，是历史水平的三倍，这将导致年底前的自由现金流为负。这一前所未有的投资表明公司资本配置的重大战略转变。

title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
summary: Google has introduced new automated functions into Workspace powered by Workspace Intelligence, its new AI system, to automate routine office tasks. The update aims to reduce manual work and boost productivity across the platform.
content: Google has introduced a host of new automated functions into Workspace, all of which are driven by Workspace Intelligence, its new AI system.

zh.title: 谷歌更新Workspace，让AI成为你的新办公实习生
zh.summary: 谷歌已将新的自动化功能引入Workspace，由其新的AI系统Workspace Intelligence驱动，以自动化日常办公任务。此更新旨在减少手动工作并提高整个平台的生产力。

title: Elon Musk admits millions of Tesla owners need upgrades for true ‘Full Self-Driving’
summary: Elon Musk admitted that millions of Tesla owners will need hardware upgrades to access full autonomous driving capabilities, contradicting years of promises that the feature would arrive via software updates alone. The disclosure could expose Tesla to legal challenges from affected customers.
content: The admission could open Tesla to legal challenges after it spent years promising customers they were just one software update away from owning fully autonomous cars.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克承认数百万特斯拉车主需要升级才能实现真正的"完全自动驾驶"
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克承认，数百万特斯拉车主将需要硬件升级才能获得完全自动驾驶功能，这与多年来"该功能将通过软件更新单独推出"的承诺相矛盾。这一披露可能会使特斯拉面临受影响客户的法律诉讼。

title: Elon Musk admits that millions of Tesla vehicles won’t get unsupervised FSD
summary: Approximately 4 million Tesla vehicles with Hardware 3 cannot receive unsupervised Full Self-Driving, CEO Elon Musk revealed, locking out customers who paid for the feature. The announcement breaks long-standing promises that FSD would arrive through software updates for existing vehicles.
content:
Tesla vehicles with the company's Hardware 3 (HW3) computer actually won't receive unsupervised Full Self-Driving (FSD), CEO Elon Musk said on Wednesday's Q1 2026 earnings call. Approximately 4 million Tesla vehicles operate on the HW3 platform, meaning that a significant chunk of Tesla owners - including customers that paid for the feature when they bought their cars - are now locked out of being able to use unsupervised FSD, which has been something Musk has been hyping for years, unless they upgrade their car or their car's hardware.
Musk:
I wish it were otherwise, but Hardware 3 simply does not have the capability to achieve unsupervi …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克承认数百万特斯拉车辆无法获得无监督完全自动驾驶
zh.summary: 首席执行官埃隆·马斯克透露，约400万辆搭载硬件3的特斯拉车辆无法接收无监督完全自动驾驶功能，这让为该功能付费的客户无法使用。该声明打破了长期以来关于完全自动驾驶将通过软件更新提供给现有车辆的承诺。

title: Hands on with X’s new AI-powered custom feeds
summary: X is launching AI-powered custom timelines curated by Grok to replace Communities, featuring personalized feeds and new ad slots. The feature gives iOS Premium subscribers early access to pin topics and receive AI-generated content recommendations.
content: X's AI-powered custom timelines are replacing Communities, with Grok-curated feeds...and new ad slots.

zh.title: 体验X的新型人工智能驱动的自定义信息流
zh.summary: X正在推出由Grok策划的人工智能驱动的自定义时间线以取代社区功能，提供个性化信息流和新的广告位。该功能为iOS高级订阅用户提供提前访问权限，以固定话题并接收人工智能生成的内容推荐。

title: Crypto scam lures ships into Strait of Hormuz, falsely promising safe passage
summary: A cryptocurrency scam lured ships into the Strait of Hormuz with false promises of safe passage, resulting in at least one vessel being attacked by Iranian forces. The incident exposes maritime vulnerabilities to digital deception schemes.
content: Ship attacked by Iran after possibly falling for safe passage crypto scam.

zh.title: 加密货币诈骗引诱船只进入霍尔木兹海峡，虚假承诺安全通行
zh.summary: 一场加密货币诈骗以虚假的安全通行承诺引诱船只进入霍尔木兹海峡，导致至少一艘船只遭到伊朗军队的袭击。该事件暴露了海事运输面临的数字欺骗漏洞。

title: LinkedIn’s CEO is moving on; please hold your tearful video tributes
summary: Ryan Roslansky has stepped down as LinkedIn's CEO after six years, with COO Dan Shapero taking over immediately. The transition marks a leadership change at the world's largest professional networking platform.
content: Ryan Roslansky has stepped down as LinkedIn's CEO after six years running the world's largest professional network. Dan Shapero, the company's COO, takes over immediately.

zh.title: 领英CEO即将离职，暂且搁置泪水致敬视频
zh.summary: 瑞恩·罗斯兰斯基在担任领英首席执行官6年后宣布离职，由首席运营官丹·沙皮罗立即接任。这一过渡标志着全球最大专业社交平台的领导层变更。

title: Tesla reports Q1 2026 earnings: Still profitable
summary: Tesla reported profitable Q1 2026 earnings with increased car sales, though battery sales and emissions credits declined year-over-year. The results demonstrate continued strength in core automotive operations.
content: Car sales are up, battery sales and emissions credits are down.

zh.summary: 特斯拉报告了2026年第一季度的盈利财报，汽车销售增加，但电池销售和排放信用同比下降。这些结果表明其核心汽车业务仍保持强劲。

title: Tesla Q1 revenue rises, driven by EV sales and FSD subscriptions
summary: Tesla's Q1 revenue rebounded to $22.4 billion, driven by increased EV sales and FSD subscriptions, while the company invests heavily in robotics, AI, and semiconductor manufacturing. The growth reflects strong demand recovery and revenue diversification.
content: Sales rebounded a bit from the first quarter of 2025, as Tesla throws a ton of money at massive bets like robotics, AI, and its own chip fab.

title: X is going to let Grok curate your timeline
summary: X is enabling Premium iOS subscribers to use Grok to curate custom timelines by pinning specific topics, with Android access launching soon. The feature combines Grok's post understanding with algorithmic personalization to tailor each user's feed.
content:
X is putting its AI chatbot, Grok, in charge of your timeline. In an announcement on Wednesday, X product head Nikita Bier says Premium subscribers on iOS can get early access to a feature that allows users to pin specific topics to their home tab, which Grok will then use to curate the posts you see across each feed.
"It's powered by Grok's understanding of every post with the algorithm's personalization - meaning every timeline is made just for you," Bier writes. "And it works even better when it's a topic you already engage with."
Bier says early access to the Grok-powered timeline is coming to Android users "very soon." Along with this …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: X将让Grok为高级用户策划时间线
zh.summary: X正在为Premium iOS订阅者启用Grok功能，以通过固定特定主题来策划自定义时间线，Android访问即将推出。该功能结合了Grok对帖子的理解和算法个性化，以定制每个用户的信息流。

title: Our newsroom AI policy
summary: Ars Technica published its internal guidelines on how the newsroom uses and limits generative AI in editorial operations. The policy provides transparency on the role of AI tools in modern journalism practices.
content: How Ars Technica uses, and doesn't use, generative AI.

zh.title: 我们的编辑室AI政策
zh.summary: Ars Technica发布了其内部指南，说明编辑室如何在编辑运营中使用和限制生成式AI。该政策对现代新闻业中AI工具的角色进行了透明说明。

title: Tesla’s revenue rises again as it prepares for more AI and robotics
summary: Tesla reported Q1 2026 revenue of $22.4 billion (up 16% year-over-year) with $477 million in net income, slightly missing analyst expectations of $22.64 billion. The earnings underscore Tesla's pivot toward AI and robotics as primary growth drivers.
content:
Tesla released its 2026 first-quarter financial earnings today, providing another look at the progress of Elon Musk's $1 trillion bet to transform his company into a leader of AI and robotics.
Tesla said it earned $477 million in net income on $22.4 billion in revenue in the quarter that ended in April 2026. That's a 16 percent increase in revenue and a 17 percent increase in profits over the first quarter of 2025, when the company earned $409 million in net income on $19.3 billion in revenue. Tesla missed revenue expectations from Wall Street, which assumed approximately $22.64 billion in revenue.
As part of the earnings update deck, Tesl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特斯拉收入再次增长，为更多AI和机器人技术做准备
zh.summary: 特斯拉报告2026年第一季度收入为224亿美元（同比增长16%），净收入为4.77亿美元，略低于分析师预期的226.4亿美元。这些收益强调了特斯拉向AI和机器人技术转向作为主要增长驱动力。

title: AI failure could trigger the next financial crisis, warns Elizabeth Warren
summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren warned that excessive spending and borrowing in the AI industry could trigger a financial crisis similar to 2008, calling for Congressional oversight. The warning highlights concerns about unsustainable growth and inflated valuations in the sector.
content:
"I know a bubble when I see one."
That's what Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), who led the push to create a new consumer financial regulator in the wake of the 2008 recession, told a crowd at a Vanderbilt Policy Accelerator event in Washington, DC on Wednesday. Warren warned of what she called "striking" parallels to that crisis in the AI industry. While she believes the technology has "enormous potential," she warned that AI companies' massive spending and borrowing practices are creating a tinderbox and Congress should step in.
Though the AI industry has grown rapidly, Warren said the pace isn't keeping up with their spending, requiring the …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI失败可能引发下一次金融危机，伊丽莎白·沃伦警告
zh.summary: 伊丽莎白·沃伦参议员警告称，人工智能行业的过度支出和借贷可能会引发类似2008年的金融危机，呼吁国会进行监督。这一警告突出了人们对该行业不可持续增长和估值虚高的担忧。

title: Lawsuit: Nintendo is getting tariff refunds—its customers should get them instead
summary: A lawsuit demands that Nintendo return the tariff refunds it received to customers instead of retaining them. The case questions whether corporations should pass savings from tariff relief to consumers.
content: Lawsuit demands Nintendo pass Trump tariff refunds on to its customers.

zh.title: 诉讼案：任天堂获得关税退款——应该退给顾客而非保留
zh.summary: 一项诉讼要求任天堂将其获得的关税退款退还给顾客，而不是保留。该案例质疑公司是否应该将关税减免的储蓄转嫁给消费者。

title: NASA’s Artemis II moon mission shows space-to-Earth laser comms can scale
summary: Observable Space and Quantum Opus successfully demonstrated space-to-Earth laser communications during NASA's Artemis II mission, proving the technology can operate at production scale. The achievement advances high-bandwidth data transmission capabilities for future space operations.
content: Observable Space and Quantum Opus teamed up to capture data beamed back from space.

zh.title: NASA的阿尔忒弥斯II号月球任务证明天地激光通信可规模化应用
zh.summary: Observable Space和Quantum Opus在NASA的阿尔忒弥斯II号任务期间成功演示了天地激光通信，证明该技术可以在生产规模上运行。这一成就推进了未来太空操作的高带宽数据传输能力。

title: Ember’s self-heating smart mug is more than $50 off ahead of Mother’s Day
summary: Ember's self-heating Mug 2 is on sale for up to $52 off ahead of Mother's Day, maintaining beverage temperatures between 120-145°F for hours using a charging coaster. The smart mug app enables precise temperature control and notifications, making it practical for keeping drinks hot throughout the workday.
content:
The Mug 2 can keep coffee, tea, cocoa, and other drinks warm for as long as you’d like. | Image: Ember	

Coffee is what gets many of us through the workday, and a proper smart mug can keep it hot for hours so you can maintain your focus without constantly getting up to reheat your cup. Thankfully, if you don’t own one, the 14-ounce Ember Mug 2 is now available for $97.49 ($52 off) from Amazon, Target, and Ember as part of Ember’s ongoing Mother’s Day sale. You can also buy the smaller 10-ounce model for $84.47 ($46 off) from the same retailers (Amazon, Target, Ember).
Ember Mug 2 (14-ounce)

Where to Buy:

 $149.95 $97.49 at Amazon
 $149.95 $97.49 at Target
 $149.95 $97.47 at Ember


Ember Mug 2 (10-ounce)

Where to Buy:

 $129.95 $84.47 at Amazon
 $129.95 $84.49 at Target
 $129.95 $84.47 at Ember

Using the Ember app, the Mug 2 lets you set an exact drinking temperature between 120 and 145 degrees Fahrenheit, which it can maintain for up to 90 minutes or all day using the included charging coaster. You don’t have to worry about the battery draining unnecessarily, either, thanks to an automatic sleep function, which powers down the smart mug when it’s empty or hasn’t been used for several hours.
The smart mug offers a fair amount of control beyond that, too. Within the Android / iOS app, you can also create and save preset temperatures for different beverages and set up notifications for when your drink reaches your preferred temperature. Meanwhile, a customizable LED indicator on the coaster lets you quickly check heating and battery status at a glance.
As a bonus, the Ember Mug 2 is also relatively easy to care for. It features a scratch-resistant coating to help prevent wear over time and carries an IPX7 water-resistance rating, so it can be safely hand-washed (just don’t put it in the dishwasher).

zh.title: Ember自热智能杯在母亲节前降价50美元以上
zh.summary: Ember自热Mug 2在母亲节前降价至多52美元，通过充电底座可数小时保持饮料温度在120-145°F之间。智能杯应用程序支持精确的温度控制和通知功能，使其能在整个工作日保持饮料温热。

title: Watch Sony’s elite ping-pong robot beat top-ranked players
summary: Sony AI's Ace robot is the first to beat top-ranked human ping-pong players while following official International Table Tennis Federation rules. The achievement addresses a major engineering challenge of combining speed, responsiveness, and precision in physical gameplay.
content:
Ace is the first robot that can beat the best human players while following the official rules of table tennis. | Image: Sony AI	

Humans have been building ping-pong playing robots for decades, such as Omron's FOREPHUS that challenged amateur competitors at CES 2017. What sets Ace apart from the rest is that the robot, which was developed by Sony's AI division, is the first that can hold its own against top-ranked human players and occasionally even beat them in matches that follow the official rules of the International Table Tennis Federation (ITTF).
AI is already capable of besting humans at games like Chess and Go, but physical games pose a much greater challenge as robots have to be engineered to match the speed and responsiveness of the human mind and body. To b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 观看索尼精英乒乓球机器人击败顶级选手
zh.summary: 索尼AI的Ace机器人是首个在遵守国际乒乓球联合会官方规则的情况下击败顶级人类乒乓球选手的机器人。这一成就解决了在物理游戏中结合速度、反应能力和精确性的重大工程挑战。

title: Google turns Chrome into an AI coworker for the workplace
summary: Google is bringing Gemini-powered auto-browse capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, automating workplace tasks like research and data entry. The feature aims to boost productivity for knowledge workers.
content: Google brings Gemini-powered 'auto browse' capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, letting workers automate tasks like research, data entry, and more.

title: Google unveils two new TPUs designed for the "agentic era"
summary: Google unveiled two new Tensor Processing Units designed for the emerging agentic era, with separate chips optimized for inference and training. These chips represent the company's strategy for AI agent deployment.
content: Google's new generation of Tensor AI chips is actually two chips, one for inference and one for training.

zh.title: 谷歌推出为"智能体时代"设计的两款新TPU

summary: Threads is launching Live Chat features to enable real-time engagement, supporting messages, photos, videos, links, and emoji reactions. The feature expands the platform's social communication capabilities.

title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises
summary: Google introduced Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, an agent-building tool designed specifically for IT and technical users. The platform targets enterprise organizations looking to deploy AI agents.
content: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform takes an interesting approach: It is geared for IT and technical users.

zh.title: 谷歌为企业推出新的智能体构建工具做出有趣选择
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了Gemini企业智能体平台,这是一个专门为IT和技术用户设计的智能体构建工具。该平台针对希望部署人工智能智能体的企业组织。

title: Anthropic’s Mythos rollout has missed America’s cybersecurity agency
summary: While Commerce and National Security Agency reportedly use Anthropic's Mythos cybersecurity model to find vulnerabilities, CISA—the nation's central cybersecurity coordinator—lacks access to the tool. The gap raises questions about coordinated AI adoption across federal agencies.
content:
Several US federal agencies are taking up Anthropic's new cybersecurity model to find vulnerabilities, but one is reportedly not getting in on the action: the nation's central cybersecurity coordinator. 
On Tuesday, Axios reported that the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) didn't have access to Mythos Preview, which Anthropic has touted as a powerful tool for finding and patching security vulnerabilities. Meanwhile, other agencies like Commerce Department and National Security Agency (NSA) are reportedly using the model, and President Donald Trump's administration has been negotiating broader access, Axios wrote last w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic的Mythos推出没有纳入美国网络安全机构
zh.summary: 据报道，商务部和国家安全局使用Anthropic的Mythos网络安全模型来发现漏洞，但作为国家网络安全协调中心的CISA却无法访问该工具。这一差距引发了关于联邦机构间协调AI采纳的问题。

title: Tabloid reports linking 10 missing and dead scientists spur FBI probe
summary: The FBI is investigating tabloid reports linking ten missing and dead scientists, suspecting foreign spies may be targeting individuals with access to government secrets. The probe highlights potential security vulnerabilities in the scientific community.
content: FBI suspects foreign spies may be targeting scientists with access to government secrets.

title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
summary: Google is rolling out AI Overviews to Gmail for workplace use, providing instant summaries synthesized across multiple emails. The feature aims to help professionals quickly digest large volumes of correspondence.
content: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.

zh.summary: 谷歌正在向工作版Gmail推出AI概览，提供跨多封邮件整合的即时摘要。该功能旨在帮助专业人士快速消化大量的电子邮件往来。

title: Microsoft teases mysterious Discord and Xbox Game Pass partnership
summary: Microsoft is teasing a new partnership between Discord and Xbox Game Pass, likely involving enhanced subscriber perks following recent price cuts. Details remain unclear, but the move suggests expanding Game Pass value.
content:
Microsoft has started teasing a new Discord and Xbox Game Pass partnership, just a day after lowering prices of its Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass subscriptions. Microsoft Gaming CEO Asha Sharma says the company is partnering with Discord again "as we continue to make Game Pass more flexible for our players."
It's not immediately clear what the latest Discord and Xbox partnership will result in, but given it's a Game Pass one it's likely related to some perks for subscribers of Xbox Game Pass. At the moment Game Pass Ultimate subscribers can get a month of Discord Nitro as part of the subscription, and it's possible that Microsoft and  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软暗示Discord和Xbox Game Pass的神秘合作
zh.summary: 微软正在预告Discord与Xbox Game Pass之间的新合作，可能涉及在近期价格下调后为订阅者提供增强的权益。具体细节仍不清楚，但这一举动表明微软正在扩大Game Pass的价值。

title: Google Meet will take AI notes for in-person meetings too
summary: Google's Gemini AI meeting notetaker now works for in-person meetings, Zoom calls, and Microsoft Teams sessions, moving beyond Google Meet limitations. The expanded feature provides meeting summaries and transcripts across multiple platforms.
content:
Google's AI meeting notetaker is no longer limited to Google Meets - Gemini can also generate summaries and transcripts of in-person meetings now, as well as meetings on Zoom and Microsoft Teams, as first reported by 9to5Google. 
Support for in-person meetings was previously limited to alpha users and only available on Android. Google's support page for the feature notes that, "If a user who is not in person wants to join the meeting, you can transition the meeting to a normal video call." The feature also works for impromptu meetings - Google says you "don't need to be in a meeting room" or in a previously scheduled meeting to use it. 
Us …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google Meet将为面对面会议提供AI笔记记录
zh.summary: Google的Gemini AI会议记录工具现在可以用于面对面会议、Zoom通话和Microsoft Teams会议，超越了Google Meet的限制。这一扩展功能可在多个平台上提供会议摘要和记录。

title: Microsoft says the ‘idea’ of an Xbox mobile store ‘is not dead’
summary: Microsoft's Xbox mobile gaming store, originally promised to launch in July 2024, has apparently stalled with its testing URL now defunct. The delayed project was intended to compete with Apple and Google in mobile gaming distribution.
content:
Microsoft first revealed it was building an Xbox mobile gaming store to take on Apple and Google all the way back in 2022. Former Xbox president Sarah Bond even went on stage at a Bloomberg event nearly two years ago and promised the store would launch in July, 2024. Now, it looks like Microsoft has put the project on hold.
Better xCloud developer redphx noticed that the store URL Microsoft had been testing for the past couple of years no longer works. It's not clear exactly when it disappeared, but the last time the website was updated was nearly a year ago.
The store was originally supposed to compete with Google and Apple, but strict ap …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软表示Xbox移动商店的"想法"还"没有死"
zh.summary: 微软原定于2024年7月推出的Xbox移动游戏商店似乎已停滞，其测试URL现已失效。这个延期的项目旨在与Apple和Google竞争移动游戏发行市场。

title: Rivian R2 production has started despite tornado damage to factory
summary: Rivian has begun production of its R2 mass-market electric vehicle despite recent tornado damage to its manufacturing facility. The milestone marks a critical step toward delivering the company's entry-level EV to customers.
content: The company's all-important mass-market EV is just about ready to start heading to customers.

zh.title: 里维安R2在工厂龙卷风损毁后开始生产
zh.summary: 里维安已开始生产其R2大众市场电动汽车，尽管近期其制造设施遭到龙卷风损毁。这一里程碑标志着向客户交付该公司入门级电动汽车的关键一步。

title: Physicists think they've solved the muon mystery
summary: New physics research suggests the muon mystery may be resolved, with results dashing hopes for a fifth fundamental force while providing precise confirmation of the Standard Model. The findings reinforce quantum field theory predictions.
content: Results dash hopes for a fifth force but provide very precise proof of Standard Model and QFT.

zh.title: 物理学家认为他们已解决了缪子之谜
zh.summary: 新的物理研究表明缪子之谜可能已得到解决，研究结果打破了第五种基本力的希望，同时精确确认了标准模型。这些发现强化了量子场论的预测。

title: Cosmetics giant Rituals confirms data breach of customer membership records
summary: Cosmetics retailer Rituals has confirmed a data breach affecting customer membership records from its 41 million member base, though the company refused to specify the exact number of affected customers. The incident raises transparency concerns.
content: The cosmetics retailer, which counts 41 million customers in its membership data, declined to provide an accurate total number of customers affected.

zh.title: 化妆品巨头Rituals证实客户会员记录数据泄露
zh.summary: 化妆品零售商Rituals证实了一起影响其4100万会员数据库中客户会员记录的数据泄露事件，尽管该公司拒绝说明受影响客户的确切数量。该事件引发了对透明度的担忧。

title: The most interesting startups showcased at Google Cloud Next 2026
summary: Google showcased a long list of AI startups at its annual Google Cloud Next conference, highlighting its push to attract AI companies to its cloud platform.
content: Google wants AI startups on its cloud and has showcased a long list of them at its annual conference.

zh.title: Google Cloud Next 2026展示的最有趣的初创公司
zh.summary: 谷歌在其年度Google Cloud Next会议上展示了一系列人工智能初创公司，突出了其吸引AI公司加入其云平台的努力。

title: Duolingo is now giving free users access to advanced learning content
summary: Duolingo is expanding access to its advanced language learning content to free users, previously restricting these features to paying subscribers.
content: Duolingo is opening up its advanced language learning content offering to free users, allowing them to acquire skills that were previously reserved to paid subscribers.

zh.title: Duolingo现在向免费用户提供高级学习内容
zh.summary: Duolingo正在扩展其高级语言学习内容的访问权限，向免费用户开放，这些功能之前仅限于付费用户。

title: Google Maps is about to get a big dose of AI
summary: Google is integrating generative AI capabilities into Maps, bringing advanced AI-powered features to its widely-used mapping platform.
content: Generative AI is being infused into Google's popular feature within Maps.

zh.title: Google Maps即将获得大量AI功能
zh.summary: 谷歌正在将生成式人工智能功能集成到地图中，为其广泛使用的地图平台带来先进的AI驱动功能。

title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multi-billion-dollar deal
summary: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, significantly expanding its computational capabilities.
content: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

zh.title: 独家：谷歌与Thinking Machines Lab加深关系签署数十亿美元交易
zh.summary: Mira Murati的Thinking Machines Lab与Google Cloud签署数十亿美元交易，获得由英伟达最新GB300芯片驱动的AI基础设施支持，大幅扩展其计算能力。

title: Behind the unraveling of Dan Crenshaw
summary: Rep. Dan Crenshaw, once featured on Time's 100 Next List as a decorated Navy SEAL, faces declining political standing and public controversy in his later career.
content:
In 2019, a 36-year-old Rep. Dan Crenshaw (R-TX), newly elected to Congress, was photographed for the inaugural Time 100 Next List, wearing a dashing eye patch and looking upwards with hope. A Harvard-educated Navy SEAL who'd lost his legs while fighting the Taliban in Afghanistan, Crenshaw was in rarefied company, listed among the magazine's candidates for tomorrow's leaders: musicians like Billie Eilish and Bad Bunny; athletes like Coco Gauff and Alysa Liu; business leaders like Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong; fellow political stars like Pete Buttigieg. 
Crenshaw was, Time declared, "what the Republican Party might look like after Donald Tru …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 丹·克伦肖政治生涯的瓦解
zh.summary: 曾以海豹突击队员身份登上《时代》杂志百大新星榜单的众议员丹·克伦肖，其政治地位日益下滑，晚期职业生涯面临公众争议。

title: Our favorite gear at Sea Otter Classic wasn't the bikes—it was the accessories
summary: Editors at the Sea Otter Classic cycling event highlighted practical accessories like Bluetooth racks and compact tow ropes as standout gear discoveries over the bikes themselves.
content: A Bluetooth suction-cup rack and a palm-sized tow rope were among our most practical finds.

zh.title: 海獭经典赛我们最喜欢的装备不是自行车——而是配件
zh.summary: 海獭经典赛自行车活动的编辑们强调了蓝牙架和紧凑型拖绳等实用配件，认为它们比自行车本身更值得关注。

title: Investors lost billions on Trump’s memecoin. Another gala won’t fix that.
summary: Investors lost billions in Trump's memecoin venture, and additional fundraising events are unlikely to recover losses or prevent potential legal consequences.
content: If Dems take Congress, Trump may face reckoning for “pay-to-play” memecoin galas.

zh.title: 投资者在特朗普迷因币上损失数十亿美元。再办一场募捐活动也无法解决这个问题。
zh.summary: 投资者在特朗普的迷因币风投中损失数十亿美元，额外的募捐活动不太可能弥补损失或防止潜在的法律后果。

title: First vacuums — then the world
summary: Chinese robot vacuum company Dreame invested $10 million in a Super Bowl ad, betting aggressively on becoming a global consumer electronics powerhouse.
content:
Many startups spend years trying to become a household name. Others just spend $10 million on a Super Bowl ad. That's Dreame's bet. The little-known Chinese robot vacuum company has grand ambitions to become a global consumer electronics giant and chose to run a pricey 30-second spot as its opening move. If it works, the ad may be remembered as the beginning of the rise of the next global tech powerhouse. If it doesn't? Well, let's just say Quibi ran a Super Bowl ad, too.

Dreame's CEO wants to be the Chinese Elon Musk

Dreame - pronounced dreamy - used its half-minute of exposure to promise a dizzying product evolution: from robot vacuums a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 先是扫地机器人，再征服世界
zh.summary: 中国扫地机器人公司Dreame投资1000万美元购买超级碗广告，积极押注成为全球消费电子产品巨头。

title: Anker made its own chip to bring AI to all its products
summary: Anker developed its custom Thus processor, a neural-net AI chip designed for audio devices and IoT products that delivers local AI capabilities with lower power consumption.
content:
Anker has announced its own custom silicon that the company says will bring local AI to audio devices, mobile accessories, and IoT devices. The Thus processor is the world's first neural-net compute-in-memory AI audio chip, which is smaller than traditional chips, and requires less power to run complex computations. That makes it an attractive solution for smaller devices. 
When comparing Thus to existing chips, Anker CEO Steven Yang said, "Every AI chip built until now stores the model on one side and does the computation on the other. To think, the device has to carry all those parameters across, many times per second, every single infere …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 安克自主研发芯片，为所有产品赋予AI能力
zh.summary: 安克开发了其定制的Thus处理器，这是一种为音频设备和物联网产品设计的神经网络AI芯片，提供低功耗的本地AI功能。

title: Anthropic’s most dangerous AI model just fell into the wrong hands
summary: Anthropic's Mythos AI model, designed for cybersecurity testing, was accessed by unauthorized users through a contractor's compromised credentials and internet reconnaissance techniques.
content:
Anthropic's Mythos AI model, a powerful cybersecurity tool that the company said could be dangerous in the wrong hands, has been accessed by a "small group of unauthorized users," Bloomberg reports. An unnamed member of the group, identified only as "a third-party contractor for Anthropic," told the publication that members of a private online forum got into Mythos via a mix of tactics, utilizing the contractor's access and "commonly used internet sleuthing tools."
The Claude Mythos Preview is a new general-purpose model that's capable of identifying and exploiting vulnerabilities "in every major operating system and every major web browser …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic最危险的AI模型落入了错误的人手中
zh.summary: Anthropic的Mythos AI模型是为网络安全测试设计的,通过承包商被泄露的凭证和互联网侦察技术被未授权用户访问。

title: Redwood Materials lays off 10% in restructuring to chase energy storage business
summary: Energy storage startup Redwood Materials is laying off 10% of its workforce as part of a restructuring to capitalize on growing demand in the energy storage market. The move reflects the company's strategic pivot to focus on its most promising business segment.
content: The company is restructuring some teams to accommodate a booming energy storage business, according to emails viewed by TechCrunch.

zh.title: 红木材料裁员10%重组，转向储能业务
zh.summary: 储能初创公司红木材料正在裁员10%作为重组的一部分，以抓住储能市场增长的机遇。这一举措反映了该公司战略的转向，专注于最有前景的业务部分。
